_comment_format: Each key is a tenant-registration code (also the instructor-login code). Same code is typed by the trainee on first launch of the VR app (binds the device to a tenant forever) AND by the instructor on the dashboard login screen. Codes are matched case-insensitively; the JSON keys must be lowercase. Replace this static file with an HTTP call to the OneBonsai client-management portal once it exposes an API (see Devlog 2026-06-04 Phase 6 scope revision).
_comment_demo: Three demo entries below — feel free to add more tenants for testing. The 'displayName' is shown in the dashboard header and the VR registration confirmation widget.
